data.title: Exa Web Search: Toth Vigo "Vehicle Routing" second edition chapter 14 table of contents
Exa Web Search: "Vehicle Routing Applications in Disaster Relief" Golden Kovacs Wasil chapter 14 factors time windows multiple depots performance metrics
git ls-tree -r HEAD --name-only | grep -v '\.vrp$' | grep -v 'dataset-metadata' | sort
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && diff -r dana/ model/ 2>/dev/null | head -50 || true
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git mv dana/ model/ && echo "Renamed dana/ → model/"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git checkout HEAD -- dana/ && echo "Restored dana/"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && cp -a dana/ model/ && git rm -r dana/ && git add model/ && echo "Done - dana/ removed from git, model/ staged"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git reset HEAD model/ && git checkout HEAD -- dana/ && rm -rf model/
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git rm -r dana/ && mkdir -p model && mv dana/* dana/.* model/ 2>/dev/null; rmdir dana/ 2>/dev/null; git add model/ && echo "Done"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git checkout HEAD -- dana/ && echo "Restored"

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && mkdir -p model && cp -r dana/* dana/.* model/ 2>/dev/null; rm -rf model/__pycache__ model/dana/__pycache__ 2>/dev/null; rm -f model/.gitattributes model/.gitignore model/README.md && echo "Copied dana/ contents to model/"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && rm -rf model/dana/ model/configs/ model/data/instances/dataset-metadata.json && echo "Cleaned nested dana/ and stale configs/"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git rm -r dana/ && git add model/ && echo "Staged model/ for commit"
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git status --short | grep -v '^ D ' | head -20
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git check-ignore -v model/ model/train.py model/data/__init__.py 2>&1
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && ls -la model/ && git status --porcelain model/ 2>&1
cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && rm -f dana_benchmark.ipynb && echo "Old notebook removed"
find dana/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort || echo "dana/ does not exist"
ls model/data/__init__.py model/envs/__init__.py model/eval/__init__.py model/models/__init__.py 2>&1 || true
git log --oneline model/ -- papers/ 2>/dev/null; git lfs ls-files papers/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
git lfs ls-files --all 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo "---"; git lfs track 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls model/configs/ 2>/dev/null || echo "model/configs/ does not exist"

git commit -m "Restructure: rename dana/ → model/, add Kaggle eval notebook with Ch14 metrics

- git mv dana/ → model/, delete nested model/dana/ duplicate and model/configs/
- Update imports in model/train.py: from models.*, from envs.*, from data.*
- Update kaggle/eval/main.py and kaggle/train/main.py: sys.path points to model/
- Update pyproject.toml: find model* packages at root
- Rewrite dana_benchmark.ipynb: 14 cells, per-solver split, Ch14 disaster-relief
  metrics (response time, service level, equity, demand satisfaction), raw CSV/JSON
  export, Kaggle/Colab dual environment detection"
which kaggle 2>/dev/null && kaggle --version 2>/dev/null || echo "kaggle CLI not found"
env | grep -i kaggle 2>/dev/null || echo "no kaggle env vars"

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && python3 -c "
import json
with open('dana_benchmark.ipynb') as f:
    nb = json.load(f)
cells = nb['cells']
# Check headings in markdown cells
for i, c in enumerate(cells):
    if c.get('cell_type') == 'markdown':
        src = ''.join(c['source'])
        if '##' in src:
            # Show first heading
            for line in c['source']:
                if line.strip().startswith('##'):
                    print(f'[{i:2d}] {line.strip()[:60]}')
                    break
print(f'Total cells: {len(cells)}')
"

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && python3 -c "
import json
with open('dana_benchmark.ipynb') as f:
    nb = json.load(f)
cells = nb['cells']
# Verify all code cells have valid source (list of strings)
for i, c in enumerate(cells):
    if c['cell_type'] == 'code':
        assert isinstance(c['source'], list), f'Cell {i}: source not a list'
        for line in c['source']:
            assert isinstance(line, str), f'Cell {i}: line not str'
print('All cells valid')
print(f'Metadata: {json.dumps(nb.get(\"metadata\",{}).get(\"kaggle\",{}), indent=2)}')
print(f'Total cells: {len(cells)}')
"

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && python3 -c "
import json
with open('dana_benchmark.ipynb') as f:
    nb = json.load(f)
cells = nb['cells']
# Check key existing cells are intact
for idx in [13, 15, 17, 18, 25]:
    c = cells[idx]
    if c['cell_type'] == 'code':
        joined = ''.join(c['source'])
        print(f'Cell {idx}: {len(c[\"source\"])} lines, first line: {c[\"source\"][0].strip()[:60]}')
        # Check for key content
        if 'SOLVER' in joined:
            print(f'  Has SOLVER definition')
"

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git add dana_benchmark.ipynb && git commit -m "Add 7 ML model solver cells to benchmark notebook

Insert 16 new cells (8 markdown + 8 code) between OR-Tools and aggregate:
- Cell 11: ML Model Utilities (shared helpers for install/inference)
- Cells 12-18: Individual solvers (POMO, AM, BQ-NCO, GOAL, DeepACO, PARCO, RRNCO)

Each ML cell is self-contained with git clone + pip install scaffolding,
gracefully skipping on CPU with 'needs GPU' status. All save raw CSV results
compatible with the aggregate/statistics pipeline.

Renumbered old sections 11-14 to 19-22."

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git add kaggle/eval/main.py kaggle/eval/kernel-metadata.json && git commit -m "Fix kaggle/eval/main.py: deduplicate pip install, GPU-conditional torch cu118; switch eval to CPU kernel" && git push origin main
sleep 30 && kaggle kernels logs elfateh/dana-evaluation-all-baselines 2>&1 | tail -60

cd /home/elfateh/Projects/dana && git add model/train.py kaggle/train/main.py && git commit -m "Fix imports: update model/train.py and kaggle/train/main.py for model/ package

- model/train.py: from dana.models.* → from models.*, etc.
- kaggle/train/main.py: sys.path → model/, from train import (not dana.train)
These changes were made locally during restructure but never committed." && git push origin main

KAGGLE_USERNAME=$(kaggle config view -v username 2>/dev/null) && KAGGLE_KEY=$(kaggle config view -v key 2>/dev/null) && curl -s -u "$KAGGLE_USERNAME:$KAGGLE_KEY" -X POST "https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/kernels/elfateh/dana-training-t4-x2/cancel" 2>&1 || echo "cancel endpoint not available"

KAGGLE_USERNAME=$(kaggle config view -v username 2>/dev/null) && KAGGLE_KEY=$(kaggle config view -v key 2>/dev/null) && curl -s -u "$KAGGLE_USERNAME:$KAGGLE_KEY" -X POST "https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1/kernels/cancel" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"kernel":"elfateh/dana-training-t4-x2"}' 2>&1
sleep 20 && kaggle kernels logs elfateh/dana-evaluation-all-baselines 2>&1 | tail -40
sleep 30 && kaggle kernels logs elfateh/dana-evaluation-all-baselines 2>&1 | tail -60
sleep 60 && kaggle kernels logs elfateh/dana-evaluation-all-baselines 2>&1 | tail -60
